title: fix(playground-ui): split barrel export into domain sub-path entries

similarOrDuplicatePRs.note: This PR is stacked on #13939 (route-level code splitting), which is still OPEN. Must merge #13939 first.

summary: Splits the monolithic @mastra/playground-ui barrel export (1.8MB single ESM file) into 16 domain-specific sub-path exports (e.g., ./agents, ./workflows, ./observability). Adds new entry point files, updates vite.config.ts build entries, updates package.json exports map, and migrates ~55 import sites in the playground package to use the new sub-paths. Combined with the parent PR's route-level code splitting, this reduces the main bundle from 5,122 KB to 3,135 KB (-39%).
maintainerNotes: Approved by abhiaiyer91. All CI checks pass, no merge conflicts, changeset present. Note: this PR targets the fix/route-level-code-splitting branch (PR #13939), NOT main. PR #13939 must be merged first. No test files changed, but this is purely a build/export restructuring with no logic changes — the test plan consists of verifying builds and tsc pass. High-quality PR with excellent description including bundle size tables.
